content: Add paginated users endpoint to backend (GET /api/admin/users with page, page_size, total)
Update App.js routing to use AdminLayout with nested routes for /admin, /admin/products, /admin/orders, /admin/users
Split AdminPage.js functionality into AdminProductsPage.js (inventory + stock management)
Create AdminOrdersPage.js to display all orders (admin view)
Create AdminUsersPage.js with pagination controls for viewing all users
Update API.js to add adminGetUsers method for paginated user fetching
Test the admin sidebar navigation and all new pages using screenshot tool
